title: Crafted World
description: A Vanilla+ Modpack that enhances almost every little feature and detail while keeping the Vanilla feel!
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/PPr2UxbL/images/c2c24e5d361a671eee2b10fcb092e249603cfd86.png)

---

**Crafted World** is a Vanilla+ ModPack that enhances the normal Minecraft experience by improving the World Generation using many well-known mods, as well as enhancing almost every little vanilla features using smaller mods. It also adds many new and exciting items as well as new dangers to look out for. On your journey, you will also encounter new animals and mysterious structures!

**Modlist** can be found by clicking on the current version

Serverfiles can be found by clicking on the current version and scrolling all the way down. Then download CraftedWorld-Server.zip


<details>
